purpose: Ring topology for ten organ addresses with explicit real/stub/locked semantics.
truth_rules: Organ ring status class must match organ truth labels from API state classification.
Locked and placeholder organs must not be rendered as production ready.
accessibility_rules: Ring node labels are always visible text, not icon-only.
proof_requirements: Inventory table listing all organ nodes with real/stub/locked classification.
change_safety: Position changes in ring must preserve organ_id mapping keys.
